hero.title: Organize your shopping and group by store
hero.subtitle: EasyBuy lets you create shopping lists with prices per store.
feature.title: One App for stores, products, and lists
feature.subtitle: EasyBuy has it all in one: stores where you shop, products with prices per store, and lists filtered by store.
features.listas.title: Lists that filter by store
features.listas.desc: Create unified shopping lists that distinguish which products to buy at each supermarket or store. Some products at the supermarket, others at the greengrocer, others at the butcher.
features.productos.title: Product master
features.productos.desc: Your personal catalog. Add products once and assign them to any list later.
features.precios.title: Product prices by store
features.precios.desc: Assign different prices per store to each product, and when you assign a store to the list, it will take the corresponding price.
features.nube.title: Local / cloud mode
features.nube.desc: Works offline with its local database. And if you prefer, you can have a separate permanent account in the cloud.
cta.title: EasyBuy is ready to use. What are you waiting for?
meta.title: EasyBuy — Your smart shopping list
meta.description: EasyBuy lets you create shopping lists grouped by store with prices per store. Download the app or use the web version.
meta.og.title: EasyBuy — Your smart shopping list
meta.og.description: Organize your shopping and group by store. EasyBuy lets you create shopping lists with prices per store.
